sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: O sweet wood, O sweet nails That bore his sweet burden which alone were worthy to support his body.;;8
Your rod and your staff, they have comforted me, O Lord, my God.;;22
We adore the sign of the cross, through which we have been granted the sacrament of salvation.;;98

sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: But God forbid that I should glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ; by whom the world is crucified to me, and I to the world.

sections.name: Lectio2
lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio2:s/!.*// s/ And the .*//s

sections.name: Lectio3
lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio2:s/6-9/4-6/ s/4 .* And the /4 And the /s

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. O blessed cross,
* Which alone was worthy to bear the Lord and King of the heaven.
V. O glorious and admirable cross, O cross to be venerated.
R. Which alone was worthy to bear the Lord and King of the heaven.

lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio5:s/ The Cross.*//s

lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio6:s/.* Then spake/Then spake/s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. By the sign of the cross
* Deliver us from our enemies, O our God.
V. Save us, O Christ our Saviour, through the power of thy Cross
V. Deliver us from our enemies, O our God.

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio8:s/.*? Thou /Thou /s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. We adore your cross, we remember your glorious passion
* Have mercy on us, O Lord, who suffered for us.
V. We adore Thee, O Christ, and we bless Thee, who by Thy Holy Cross hast redeemed the world.
R. Have mercy on us, O Lord, who suffered for us.

sections.name: Lectio12
lines: @Sancti/09-14:Lectio9

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. Behold the Cross of the Lord, begone all evil powers, the Lion of the tribe of Judah,
* The root of David has conquered! Alleluia.
V. O Blessed cross, on which the King of the Angels triumphed.
R. The root of David has conquered, Alleluia.

sections.name: Capitulum Laudes
lines: @Sancti/05-03
